Appearances:
Plaintiff Hayes Valley Properties is present. Represented by Nat Kessler.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Ian McFaul is present.
Attorney Elizabeth N. Furlow representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Neil Bardack, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of AUG-06-2012 remains on calendar.
